scripts.personalization: 4 locations in Columbus, 23K IG followers, voted Columbus #1 med spa 2 years running, Galderma national trainer — $5K/mo whale
scripts.opener: Hi, I'm Andrew, a small business owner researching what med spas really need. Are you with a patient now, or do you have 60 seconds to answer a question?
scripts.painQuestion: I noticed you've grown to 4 locations across Columbus — congrats on that. With that kind of volume, when someone calls one location and nobody picks up, how fast does your team typically get back to them?
scripts.ifInstagram: That's actually what I'm building — an AI-powered Instagram DM responder that replies instantly, qualifies the lead, and books them. Would you be open to a 10-minute demo this week?
scripts.ifPhone: That's exactly the problem I solve — an AI receptionist that texts back missed calls instantly and books appointments. Would you be open to a 10-minute demo?
scripts.ifBoth: We actually handle both — instant Instagram DM responses AND missed call text-back. Would a 10-minute demo be worth your time this week?
scripts.objectionPrice: It pays for itself with one recovered appointment. Most med spa treatments are $300-1,200 — one missed call that we catch covers the entire month.
scripts.objectionNotInterested: Totally fair. If you ever notice leads slipping through after hours, I'm easy to find. Have a great day!
